mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_exchange_trade ( exec_id, buy_cl_order_id, sell_cl_order_id, exec_qty, exec_price, trade_time, market, security_id, buy_shareholder_id, sell_shareholder_id ) VALUES
(#{trade.execId}, #{trade.buyClOrderId}, #{trade.sellClOrderId}, #{trade.execQty}, #{trade.execPrice}, #{trade.tradeTime}, #{trade.market}, #{trade.securityId}, #{trade.buyShareholderId}, #{trade.sellShareholderId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_exchange_trade WHERE exec_id = #{execId}
